input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.5.10 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.5.10
            TITLE: head restraint protection

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.10: Head Restraint Protection
F.5.10 Head Restraint Protection  
An additional frame member may be added to meet T.2.8.3.b

RULE: f.5.10.1
            TITLE: if used, the head restraint protection frame member must:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.10.1: If used, the Head Restraint Protection frame member must:
F.5.10.1 If used, the Head Restraint Protection frame member must: 
a. Attach to the nodes where the Main Hoop Braces F.5.9.2 connect to the Main Hoop  
b. Be constructed of a single piece of uncut, continuous, closed section steel tubing meeting 
F.3.2.1.h  
c. Meet F.5.2.1 and F.5.2.2, as applicable  (does not need to meet F.5.2.3)

RULE: f.5.10.2
            TITLE: the head restraint or mounting t.2.8 must not attach to the head restraint protection

            CONTENT:
            rule F.5.10.2: The Head Restraint or mounting T.2.8 must not attach to the Head Restraint Protection
F.5.10.2 The Head Restraint or mounting T.2.8 must not attach to the Head Restraint Protection

final_answer: rule F.5.10: Head Restraint Protection F.5.10 Head Restraint Protection An additional frame member may be added to meet T.2.8.3.b
